title: FNAF things
description: This mod adds fnaf things. its epic!!!
body:
This mod adds some fnaf things to your world. some are creative only such as the blood bucket, Some are survival-friendly such as the Freddy Head, the Freddy Animatronic which i textured so bad and the Bonnie Animatronic and much much more!

There are alot of features inside this mod, such as the Freddy Suit, the Freddy Sword and The Knife.

### **This mod is still in development so future updates and betas will come.**

I would like for yall to download this mod so i can be happy, so you can also laugh at how bad i textured things, play with Freddy and Bonnie and clutch with the blood bucket!

This mod was made with MCreator.

This mod requires Fabric API 1.21.8+ (.9,.10 and .11 )
